sentences.arabic: زَارَ الطَّالِبُ مَكْتَبَةً قَدِيمَةً فِي مَدِينَةِ بَغْدَادَ.
sentences.translation: Učenik je posjetio staru biblioteku u gradu Bagdadu.
sentences.translationEn: The student visited an old library in the city of Baghdad.

sentences.arabic: وَجَدَ هُنَاكَ كُتُبًا كَثِيرَةً عَنِ الْأَدَبِ وَاللُّغَةِ.
sentences.translation: Tamo je pronašao mnogo knjiga o književnosti i jeziku.
sentences.translationEn: He found many books about literature and language there.

sentences.arabic: قَرَأَ كِتَابَ "كَلِيلَة وَدِمْنَة" الَّذِي يَحْكِي قِصَصًا عَلَى لِسَانِ الْحَيَوَانَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Čitao je knjigu "Kalila i Dimna" koja priča priče kroz likove životinja.
sentences.translationEn: He read the book 'Kalila and Dimna,' which tells stories through the voices of animals.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الْجُمَلُ بَسِيطَةً وَلَكِنَّهَا تَحْمِلُ حِكْمَةً عَمِيقَةً.
sentences.translation: Rečenice su bile jednostavne, ali su nosile duboku mudrost.
sentences.translationEn: The sentences were simple but carried deep wisdom.

sentences.arabic: شَعَرَ الطَّالِبُ بِالْفَخْرِ بِهَذَا التَّارِيخِ الْأَدَبِيِّ الْعَظِيمِ.
sentences.translation: Učenik je osjetio ponos zbog ove velike književne historije.
sentences.translationEn: The student felt proud of this great literary history.
